mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 0.5%, the cost of capital for leveraged buyouts and corporate refinancing drops significantly, compressing discount rates and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: High unemployment rates persistently above 9% signal weak consumer demand and elevated structural labor market friction, which suppresses corporate earnings growth and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE > 9%, or the correlation between UNRATE levels and 60-day returns is positive.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production indices exceeding 95 indicate a resumption of manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side recovery, which precedes positive equity returns as firms report improved operational efficiency.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Low housing starts below 600k units reflect a collapse in construction demand and consumer confidence in real estate, which drags down related sectors and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST < 600, or the signal shows no predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01).

mechanism_narrative: The combination of low nominal interest rates and rising inflation creates negative real yields, incentivizing investors to shift capital from fixed income to equities, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term (FEDFUNDS * CPIAUCSL) has a negative coefficient in a multivariate regression of 20-day returns, or the joint signal fails to outperform single-series signals.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDP growth during the post-shock recovery phase signals that the economy has bottomed out and is expanding, which drives corporate earnings expectations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of instances where GDPC1 is growing.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment exceeding 130,000 thousand persons indicates a robust labor market with sufficient consumer spending power, which supports corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or the threshold condition shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: High sales of existing homes reflect strong consumer confidence and liquidity in the housing market, which acts as a leading indicator for short-term equity market sentiment and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns are negative in > 55% of instances.
